## Testing

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to PHASE_2_DECISIONS.md or PHASE_2_BLOCKERS.md
- [ ] Design doc or architecture decision documented (if applicable)
- [ ] Code comments for non-obvious logic
- [ ] No performance regressions
- [ ] Ready for @assistant architecture review

## Risk Level

- [ ] Low (isolated change, easy to revert)
- [ ] Medium (touches core logic, may need hotfix)
- [ ] High (architectural change, high blast radius)
